summary: fromDefect: no test coverage for next computation
detail: All 5 constructors (makeSuccess, makeFailure, makeDenied, makeCancelled, fromDefect) are claimed to compute `next`, but fromDefect has zero test coverage. Source at typed-result.ts:246-264 shows it does compute next via serializeNext(suggestedToolsFor(...), affordancesFor(...)), but no test verifies this. The test file imports 10 functions but excludes fromDefect.

summary: analytics.ts staged alongside TOOL-AFFORDANCES but not in implementation claim
detail: packages/opencode/src/tool/analytics.ts is staged with tool_invocations metric additions (39 line diff). This appears to be bundled into the same commit but was not mentioned in the 3-file implementation scope: typed-result.ts, roadmap.ts, typed-result-affordances.test.ts. Could be an unintended bundled change or a separate lane's work that leaked into staging.

summary: typed-result.ts has unstaged changes on top of staged changes
detail: git status shows typed-result.ts has BOTH staged (M) and unstaged (M) changes. The staged diff (HEAD→index) is 339 lines. Any additional unstaged changes (index→working tree) are not visible in the diffs captured. Could indicate work-in-progress edits not yet staged.
